description: Letter from Abū l-ʿAlāʾ b. ʿAyyāsh to his 'brother' in Fustat. In Arabic script. The sender mentions that he is unemployed (qāʿid baṭṭāl) and may intend to marry (dukhūl ʿarūs). Asks that the addressee send half of something, probably money, with his in-laws as he is in need of it. On verso there is a list in Judaeo-Arabic containing names and numbers (see separate record).
description_he: מכתב מאבו אל-עלא בן עיאש ל'אחיו' בפוסטאט בכתב ערבי; מדווח שהוא מובטל ושוקל להתחתן; מבקש לשלוח כסף עם מחותניו
